---
title: Today Imad Learned
description: "Short notes on things I learn day-to-day — Python internals, GPU programming, shell tricks, testing patterns, and more. Each entry is a single idea, written to be useful as a quick reference."
highlight-style: atom-one
listing:
  contents:
    - til
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, categories]
  page-size: 120
image-align: left
page-layout: full
image: images/til-image.png
css: assets/listing.css
---
